# arubasdwan_security_policies (Data Source)

Fetches security policies for a segment pair from the Orchestrator.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "arubasdwan_security_policies" "default" {
  segment_pair = "0:0"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `segment_pair` (String) The segment pair to query (e.g. "0_0").

### Read-Only

- `security_policies` (Attributes List) List of security policy rules. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--security_policies))

<a id="nestedatt--security_policies"></a>
### Nested Schema for `security_policies`

Read-Only:

- `acl` (String) ACL class name.
- `action` (String) Action: allow or deny.
- `app_group` (String) Application group match.
- `application` (String) Application match.
- `comment` (String) Rule comment.
- `dest_zone_id` (Number) Destination security zone ID.
- `dscp` (String) DSCP match.
- `dst_address_group` (String) Destination IP address group reference.
- `dst_dns` (String) Destination DNS match.
- `dst_geo` (String) Destination geo location match.
- `dst_ip` (String) Destination IP match.
- `dst_port` (String) Destination port match.
- `dst_service` (String) Destination service match.
- `either_address_group` (String) Either direction IP address group reference.
- `either_dns` (String) Either DNS match.
- `either_geo` (String) Either geo location match.
- `either_ip` (String) Either IP match.
- `either_port` (String) Either port match.
- `either_service` (String) Either service match.
- `log_priority` (String) Logging priority level.
- `logging` (String) Logging: enable or disable.
- `overlay` (String) Overlay match.
- `priority` (Number) Rule priority.
- `protocol` (String) Protocol match.
- `rule_state` (String) Rule state: enable or disable.
- `source_zone_id` (Number) Source security zone ID.
- `src_address_group` (String) Source IP address group reference.
- `src_dns` (String) Source DNS match.
- `src_geo` (String) Source geo location match.
- `src_ip` (String) Source IP match.
- `src_port` (String) Source port match.
- `src_service` (String) Source service match.
- `vlan` (String) Interface/VLAN match.
